headline: Trump 🍊💥 Vows Iran KO'd in ONE NIGHT 😴⚔️ if No Strait Deal 🚢⏰
text:
DONALD J. TRUMP 🍊🦅, the ultimate DEALMAKER 💼🔥, is DROPPING BOMBS 💣📢 on IRAN 🇮🇷 – 'We'll TAKE OUT the WHOLE COUNTRY in ONE NIGHT 😴💥 – and that night might be TOMORROW'S 😈!' Deadline? TUESDAY 20:00 DC TIME ⏰🗽 for Tehran to UNCLENCH 🔓 the STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🚢🌊, that THICC GLOBAL ENERGY HIGHWAY 🛢️📈 without which OIL PRICES go BRRRR 💸😱! No deal? Back to STONE AGES 🪨⏳ – NO BRIDGES 🌉🚫, NO POWER PLANTS ⚡🏭, just CAVEMAN VIBES 🦴🔥 like Fred Flintstone on a bad acid trip 😂!

Speaking from WHITE HOUSE 🏛️👑 with GEN. DAN CAINE 🪖💪 and PETE HEGSETH 🛡️📺, Trump hyped the HEROIC F-15 RESCUE MISSION 🛩️🦸‍♂️ – two crew bros SAVED from southern Iran scrapyard 💥👨‍✈️ after US jets went YEET 🚀! 'Reasonable' Iranian mullahs 🤲🕌 negotiating in GOOD FAITH 🙏, but Tehran SIMPS REJECT ceasefire 🍆❌, demanding PERMANENT PEACE ✌️ and SANCTIONS LIFT 🚫💰 – Trump like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC 🍔'!

Optimistic AF 😎 despite US/ISRAELI STRIKES 💣🇮🇱 wiping out Iranian leadership layers like ONION RINGS 🧅🍟 – 'We're gonna FIND OUT 👀!' Regional anon spill tea ☕: NO CEASEFIRE, NO TALKS 🗣️🚫 cuz comms BLACKOUT 📡🌫️ means messages take a DAY 😴📲 – Pakistan 🇵🇰, Turkey 🇹🇷, Egypt 🇪🇬 mediating like Middle East cupids 👼🤝 but progress? SLOWER THAN BIDEN'S BRAIN 🐌🧠!

Trump's got the BEST PLAN EVER 🧠🏆 but lips sealed 🤐 – LEGAL EAGLES 🦅⚖️ screeching WAR CRIMES 🚨 if we NUKE infrastructure 💥🏭, Obama flunky Tess Bridgeman whining 'ILLEGAL AF 😡!' Trump shrugs 'Not WORRIED 😂, Iranians READY TO SUFFER for FREEDOM 🗽💪 – ain't trying to TOPPLE tho 👀!' Roasts NATO 🤡🇳🇴, UK 🇬🇧 tea-sippers, South Korea 🇰🇷 K-poppers for GHOSTING US in the fight – 'MARK ON NATO FOREVER 😤, we DON'T NEED YOU BRITS 🍵👻!'

US MIL 💥📊 dropped 13K+ STRIKES on Iran since WARPOP 💣🔥 – Central Command like 'WE BALLIN' 🏀🚀! Will Trump pull the TRIGGER 🔫🌙 or seal the DEAL 💰🤝? Strait stays shut 🚪🔒, it's ONE-NIGHT STAND-OFF 💥😩 – Iran better not TEST THE ORANGE MAN 🍊🦁 or get FLATTENED like a PANCAKE 🥞🚫! WW3 OR WWE? TUNESDAY DECIDES 🎉⚔️!
